title: AXRequiredValidationRule
description: Validation rule class that ensures a field is not empty or null.

types.title: AXRequiredValidationRule

props.name: options
props.description: Configuration options for the required validation rule.

types.description: Validation rule that checks if a value is present and not empty, commonly used for required form fields.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Validates that the value is not empty, null, or undefined.

methods.name: validateAsync
methods.description: Asynchronously validates that the value is not empty, null, or undefined.
